payload.question:
## Design & Narrative Coherence Plan Ready

**Issues Found:** undefined
**High Priority:** 0
**Estimated Changes:** undefined

### Emotional Arc Assessment:
Arc has strong bones but three structural weaknesses: (1) intro-instructions breaks immersion with dead air; (2) commercial-why and shark-reason create fatigue valleys before Survivor/Maury peaks; (3) Jeff confusion gag has diminishing returns by third occurrence. TV conceit strongest during Feud and Maury, weakest during intro-instructions and shark-reason.

### Key Improvements Planned:
Review pending

Approve to proceed with implementation, or provide feedback to adjust the plan.
payload.title: Design Plan Review
